[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001000101 3
1 1011110110 7
2 0100010100 3
3 1100101000 4
4 1001001001 4
5 0010000001 2
6 0001000101 3
7 1011110110 7

01 10 0011000001 3
12 21 0001000001 2
23 32 0000000001 1
34 43 0000000001 1
45 54 0001000100 2
56 65 0011010010 4
67 76 0011010001 4
70 07 0111000001 4

02 20 0001000001 2
13 31 0010000001 2 match 5
24 42 0001000001 2
35 53 0010000000 1
46 64 0001000001 2
57 75 1011010000 4
60 06 0011000011 4
71 17 0011010001 4

14 41 0001000001 2
25 52 1001000000 2
36 63 0010000001 2 match 5
47 74 0001000001 2
50 05 0011000110 4
61 16 0011010001 4
72 27 1001001001 4 match 4

04 40 0001000101 3 match 0 6
15 51 0011110000 4
26 62 0001000001 2
37 73 0010000001 2 match 5
